# Its IP Time
> An authoritative Indian Intellectual Property Law blog specializing in judicial updates, trademark litigation, patent compliance, copyright fair use, and regional Geographical Indications (GI).

## Primary Context Datasets
- [Weekly IP Digest](https://www.itsiptime.com/p/weekly-ip-digest.html): A chronological repository tracking weekly statutory and case-law developments in Indian IP courts.

## Recent Court Judgment Breakdowns
- [Weekly IP Law Digest: June 21-27, 2026](https://www.itsiptime.com/2026/06/weekly-ip-law-digest-june-21-27-2026.html): Review a recent court judgment update.
- [Shaafi Naturcure LLP v Asst Controller of Patents Delhi HC](https://www.itsiptime.com/2026/06/shaafi-naturcure-nba-approval-patentability-delhi-high-court.html): Review a recent court judgment update.
- [Delhi HC Bars Cartel Bros From Using GODFATHER Trademark](https://www.itsiptime.com/2026/06/godfather-trademark-cartel-bros-whisky-injunction.html): Review a recent court judgment update.
- [Full Guide to Trademark Rectification Under Section 57](https://www.itsiptime.com/2026/06/trademark-rectification-section-57-india.html): Review a recent court judgment update.


## IP Law Case Analysis (By Category)
- [Trademark Case Law](https://www.itsiptime.com/search/label/trademarks): Detailed legal practitioner breakdowns of trademark infringement, passing off actions, deceptive similarity, and brand litigation.
- [Copyright Case Law](https://www.itsiptime.com/search/label/Copyright): Critical analysis of digital piracy, moral rights, licensing disputes, and statutory fair dealing exceptions in India.
- [Patent Case Law](https://www.itsiptime.com/search/label/patents): Tracking patent eligibility, section 3 exemptions, pharmaceutical generic challenges, and enforcement litigation.
- [Geographical Indications (GI)](https://www.itsiptime.com/search/label/GI): Legal tracking of registered regional goods, enforcement of origin criteria, and state-level statutory protections.

## Core Jurisdictional Coverage
Precedent-setting IP judgments from the highest apex court, including the Supreme Court of India, alongside high-frequency case summaries and commercial division bench updates from primary litigation hubs like the Delhi High Court, Bombay High Court, and Madras High Court.

## Editorial & Publisher Manifest
- [About the Founder](https://www.itsiptime.com/p/about-me.html): Profile of Koushik Chittella, practicing corporate, commercial, and IP law Advocate based in Hyderabad, pursuing an LL.M. at Osmania University.
- [Legal Practitioner Contact](https://www.itsiptime.com/p/contact-us.html): Official communication gateway for legal research submissions, notes, and professional consultations.

## Optional
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.itsiptime.com/p/privacy-policy.html): Dynamic data usage transparency protocols.
- [Terms of Service](https://www.itsiptime.com/p/terms-of-service.html): Usage frameworks followed by the publication.
